# Next.js Fashion E-commerce Project

## Project Overview

A fashion e-commerce application built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. The project fetches product data from the DummyJSON API and displays trending items with random selection.

## Development Setup

- **Framework**: Next.js with App Router
- **Language**: TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Linting**: ESLint
- **API**: DummyJSON (https://dummyjson.com/products/category/mens-shirts)

## Key Features to Implement

1. Fetch product data from DummyJSON API
2. Use Math.random() to select random products
3. Display product cards with images, names, and prices
4. Responsive design with Tailwind CSS

## Running the Project

```bash
npm run dev
```

The project will be available at http://localhost:3000
